| Collection | Template | titleField | Key fields / relations |

# ✅ Done — Employee Documents "Dossier / Document Vault" reproduced in NocoBase (`appslib`)

Built end-to-end from the OSS prototype's embedded `nb-spec` (the authoritative source), native-first per the skill's container/content rule. All blocks render, all enums seeded, all interactions verified, **0 console/page errors**.

## Collections (`edm_` prefix)
| Collection | Template | titleField | Key fields / relations |
|---|---|---|---|
| `edm_categories` | **tree** | `name` | name, code, icon, retention_years, is_mandatory + self-relation `parent`/`children` (parentId) |
| `edm_employees` | general | `full_name` | full_name, employee_no, department(6-enum), title, email + reverse `documents` |
| `edm_documents` | general | `title` | title, doc_type(8), file_name, file_ext(5), file_size_kb, status(6), issued_on, expires_on, is_confidential, note + **m2o** `employee`(employeeId), `category`(categoryId) |

**English seed:** 10 categories (6 roots + 4 children, correctly parented) · 10 employees (covers all 6 departments incl. added HR/Finance) · **25 documents** covering **every** branch — status: active/expiring/expired/missing/pending_review/**archived**; file_ext: pdf/docx/jpg/png/**xlsx**; all 8 doc_types. All relations populated.

## Pages
| Page | pageSchemaUid |
|---|---|
| **🏆 Document Vault (signature)** | **`roe72fm2qdx`** |
| Documents (CRUD table) | `uoqoc03a6if` |

**Signature page composition** (container native, content JS):
- **KPI strip** — JSBlock `ko3b2gd5te4` (4 live-count cards: 25 / 15 / 4 / 3).
- **Filing cabinet** — native **Tree** `osikyao1pdc` on `edm_categories`, `connectFields → grid` (filterPaths `category.id`).
- **Documents grid** — native **List** `72hjm3npb91` + **JSField card** `08o17tsavlc` (file tile, lock, type/status chips, dates, urgency progress bar) + **CSS auto-fill 2-col grid** + toolbar **JSItemAction pills** `knykzqyc4vt` (with live counts) + record **ViewAction** `zcdh8u4o7hv`.
- **Expiry rail** — native **List** `vx9nk8m435d` (dataScope `status ∈ {expiring,expired,missing}`, sort `expires_on asc`) + **JSField alert card** `fxpol5b6rod` (urgency dot/icon, days countdown, Renew).

## Comparison vs prototype (side-by-side captured)
**Matches:** KPI strip with icons+trend badges, 3-pane layout, **2-column responsive card grid**, full card anatomy (colored file-type tile, title+lock, employee+no, type/status chips, issued/expires, urgency progress bar, footer countdown), status pills **with counts**, expiry rail alert cards with day-counts + Renew, status/ext color language with raw-value fallback.

**Gaps (mostly native-block limits):**
1. **Tree** has no per-node folder icon or rollup **count badge** (native Tree renders titles only).
2. **Expiry rail** is a flat urgency-sorted list — no sticky `OVERDUE / DUE THIS MONTH / DUE SOON` group headers (a List can't inject group rows from a per-row renderer); urgency is still conveyed by colored left-border + dot + days.
3. Grid header uses the native **Filter** button instead of the prototype's free-text search box + sort dropdown.
4. KPI numbers are **live from seed** (25/15/4/3) vs the prototype's mock (22/13/4/4) — correct behavior, not a defect.
5. Clicking a **parent category that only has child-docs** (Identity, Certifications) shows 0 — cross-filter matches `category.id` exactly, no descendant rollup.
